title: Measure Layout, Paint, and Compositing Cost
summary: Build and verify css animation performance in ethical launch illustration performance trace through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css animation performance from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css animation performance without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

options.text: Ethical launch illustration performance trace case 1: transform and opacity are always free and need no performance verification.
Ethical launch illustration performance trace case 1: prefer transform or opacity when suitable, measure actual layout paint compositing and memory behavior, and remove speculative promotion hints.
Ethical launch illustration performance trace case 1: add will-change transform to every card so the browser permanently prepares all animations.

steps.title: 02 · Read the ethical launch illustration performance trace case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 2: Which claim preserves css animation performance when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: ethical launch illustration performance trace.
steps.why: Measure Layout, Paint, and Compositing Cost makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 2 in ethical launch illustration performance trace.

content.text: Transform and opacity often avoid layout and may composite efficiently, but they are not free. Large layers, filters, shadows, blend modes, texture uploads, and too many promoted elements can consume memory and paint time. Will-change is a temporary hint, not a blanket optimization. Record a performance trace, layer evidence, frame behavior, and low-powered conditions before claiming improvement. Apply it to ethical launch illustration performance trace.
